expectations.evidence: Single cohesive article organized by theme. No 'Part 1' or 'Part 2' divisions. Content from both transcripts woven together seamlessly.
Dedicated section 'Document Ingestion and Chunking' covering token ranges, overlap, semantic chunking
'Reranking with Cross-Encoders' subsection under Advanced Retrieval Techniques
Dedicated section 'Hallucination Detection' covering grounded generation and faithfulness checking
RAGAS mentioned in Evaluation section as automated evaluation framework
TL;DR blockquote at top with comprehensive summary
Key Takeaways section with 9 bullet points
Sources footer: 'Building Production RAG Systems — Part 1: Retrieval; Building Production RAG Systems — Part 2: Generation and Evaluation'
Proper markdown with H1, H2, H3, blockquote, bullet lists, bold
